title: JEPArdy! Non-Record Submission - JEPA + Leader-Stack - val_bpb 1.1230
author: simon-marcus

data.description: Uses LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 in the model stack.

data.scope: attn, mlp, embed, other floating tensors

data.description: JEPA auxiliary loss used during training with a tuned loss weight of 0.10.

novel_contributions: JEPA auxiliary loss integrated into a leader-family stack and validated by ablation.
Selection of JEPA_LOSS_WEIGHT=0.10 based on longer-horizon validation rather than short screens.
Storage-only export pass that removes duplicate top-level JEPA alias weights.
Post-training int6 quantization of selected floating tensors for artifact-size reduction.
Use of full-model EMA for export/eval stability.
